user.title: Connect to Crestron Home Processor
user.description: Provide the connection details and Web API token for your Crestron Home Processor.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Crestron Home processor. Verify the IP address, port, and network status.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Verify the Web API token.

abort.already_configured: This Crestron Home processor is already configured.
